name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms well and remove the stems close to the caps.
2. Chop the mushroom stems finely.
3. In a skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter. Cook the chopped mushroom stems and celery for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the bread crumbs and seasonings (onion juice, pepper, salt, and parsley). Mix until well combined.
5. Place the mushroom caps gill side up on a shallow pan.
6. Fill each cap with mounds of the stuffing mixture.
7. Pour the remaining melted butter around the stuffed mushrooms.
8. Cover the pan closely and bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees) for 30 to 45 minutes.
9. Toward the end of baking, remove the cover and let the crumbs brown lightly on top, or place the pan under the broiler for a few minutes to brown.
10. Serve on rounds of buttered toast.
